code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut p = 0
  mut neg = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45
    let is_plus = b == 43
    if in_num
      if is_digit
        val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      else
        let signed = val * sign
        if signed > 0
          p = p + signed
        else if signed < 0
          neg = neg + signed
        end
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else
      if is_minus
        in_num = true
        sign = -1
        val = 0
      else if is_plus
        in_num = true
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      else if is_digit
        in_num = true
        sign = 1
        val = b - 48
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    let signed = val * sign
    if signed > 0
      p = p + signed
    else if signed < 0
      neg = neg + signed
    end
  end
  let r = p - neg
  println("r=#{r}")
end
